title: Create Ad Astra Recipes
description: Adds recipes to make Create and Ad Astra more compatible
body:
# **This is a simple mod to add extra recipes for more compatability between [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)**

# **Current Recipes:**

## Glacian Fur

Crafted with permafrost and any type of wool

## Glacian Leaves

Crafted with permafrost and any type of leaves

## Glacian Log

Crafted with permafrost and any type of log

## Glacio Stone

Crafted with permafrost and any type of stone

## Tier 1-4 Rockets

Same recipes but now are able to be made in mechanical crafters for easier automation

### Requires [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)

## Ports

**Fabric** : I dont have plans to port it so I recommend using [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), if enough demand I will consider it though.

**1.20.1+** : I will be porting it to version beyond 1.20.1 whenever [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) update past it

**1.20.1-** : I'll be porting it to the requested version, you can ask in my [curseforge comments](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-ad-astra-recipes)

**You can use this mod in your modpacks as long as it stays on curseforge or modrinth**

**Unfortunately I have to go out my way to say this: This mod is ONLY on modrinth or curseforge, NO other sites have a trusted download on this mod.**
